articles.title: GLOBAL REGULATORS, EXCHANGES PUSH BACK ON TOKENIZED STOCKS
articles.summary: Global financial regulators, including ESMA, IOSCO, and the World Federation of Exchanges, are urging the SEC to strengthen oversight of tokenized stocks, arguing these products misleadingly mimic traditional equities without providing equivalent investor protections. The organizations have expressed alarm at the growing number of brokers and crypto platforms offering tokenized stocks, claiming they are marketed as equivalent to actual stocks when they fundamentally are not, potentially exposing investors to significant risks. This regulatory pushback comes as tokenized assets reach $26 billion in value and major platforms like Coinbase, Kraken, and Robinhood expand into the space, mirroring previous successful lobbying efforts by traditional financial institutions to limit blockchain-based competition. Despite these concerns, SEC leadership has indicated openness to tokenization innovation while emphasizing that tokenized securities must still comply with existing securities laws.

articles.title: GALAXY, MULTICOIN, JUMP PLAN $1B SOLANA TREASURY
articles.summary: Galaxy Digital, Multicoin Capital, and Jump Crypto are in talks with backers to raise $1B for a dedicated Solana treasury in what would be the largest accumulation vehicle for the token. Cantor Fitzgerald is acting as lead banker, with plans to structure the effort as a digital asset treasury company via the takeover of a publicly traded entity. The Solana Foundation has reportedly endorsed the effort.

articles.title: LATAM STABLECOIN PAYMENTS LANDSCAPE V2 RELEASED
articles.summary: An updated map of the Latin American stablecoin ecosystem highlights surging adoption, with USDT and USDC accounting for over 90% of July 2025 exchange volume. Local stablecoins are also booming, with BRL-pegged tokens up 660% year-on-year and MXN-pegged volumes growing 1,000x. Version 2 expands coverage across wallets, exchanges, issuers, and on/off ramps, reflecting the rapid buildout of stablecoin infrastructure across the region.

articles.title: BLIND: THE SOCIAL CAPITAL LAUNCHPAD
articles.summary: Blind is a new token launchpad launching on Base that enables users to leverage their social capital while maintaining privacy control over their identity data. The platform pulls social statistics from connected X accounts and various data sources, including Ethos Network and Kaito, allowing users to selectively reveal metrics like follower counts, reputation scores, and mutual connections when deploying tokens. A key differentiator is a social gating functionality that restricts token launch participation to users meeting specific criteria, such as follower thresholds or mutual connections with particular accounts, implemented through Uniswap V4 custom hooks.

articles.title: A NON-LEVERAGED STABLECOIN THREAD
articles.summary: There are eleven non-leveraged stablecoin strategies offering >10% APR, ranging from simple fixed-rate options like Pendle's 18% APR locks to more complex multi-step approaches yielding up to 30%. Highlights include Gearbox's lending campaigns (14-30% across different chains), InfiniFi's flexible-duration Pendle PT ETF (9-17% APY), and Gauntlet's fee-free alpha vault at 11.7% APY with USDC liquidity. There are upcoming launches for Solstice (19%) and Neutrl (29%), plus a complex basis trade strategy combining syrupUSDC margin, HYPE shorts, and Pendle PT positions for 24% total APR.

articles.title: ZORA'S BIG BET: TURNING CONTENT INTO COINS
articles.summary: Zora's "content coins" thesis aims to tokenize individual pieces of content to capture both subjective and commercial value, challenging the current creator economy where platforms retain 65% of the $320B market through extractive revenue splits. The model faces criticism over whether ordinary users' content has sufficient value beyond speculative collecting, with Base's messaging emphasizing subjective value while avoiding concrete commercial value capture mechanisms. Critics argue that "buying posts" behavior won't scale for normie content, though similar patterns already exist through tipping culture, Reddit gold, and creator collectibles across platforms. Zora's success depends on developing programmable revenue sharing, onchain sponsorship routing, and creator investment tools that could transform social platforms from synthetic attention derivatives into spot markets for granular content ownership.

articles.title: HOW TO NOT LOSE MONEY IN PREDICTION MARKETS
articles.summary: The current wave of "prediction market for X" projects mirrors failed "Uber for Y" concepts and will largely collapse due to fundamental misunderstandings of market microstructure and liquidity sourcing. Successful prediction markets require exogenous information flow, perpetual variance, and natural hedgers bringing differentiated views – elements that most verticalized applications lack since they attempt to manufacture variance internally rather than sourcing it from real-world needs. Tokens and memecoins already function as effective prediction markets for attention and narrative momentum, demonstrating that markets succeed through mimetic behavior where participants want to be "right together" rather than through novel application skins. The space needs innovation in market architecture and perpetualization mechanisms rather than more specialized verticals, as episodic binary bets naturally decay while continuous structures compound liquidity and variance forward.

articles.title: AAVE NOW COMPARABLE TO 37TH-LARGEST U.S. BANK BY ASSETS
articles.summary: Aave's $71.15B in assets would rank it as the 37th-largest U.S. bank, just behind UMB and ahead of Old National Bank. Unlike banks, Aave is an open DeFi protocol with no branches, offering non-Fed–correlated yield that any financial institution can plug into.

articles.title: CHAINLINK POSITIONED AS DEFAULT STANDARD FOR TRADFI ONCHAIN
articles.summary: Chainlink is rapidly becoming the de facto standard for serious TradFi integrations.

articles.title: STRATEGY ADDS $357M IN BTC, TREASURY NEARS 632K COINS
articles.summary: Strategy bought 3,081 BTC for $356.9M at an average price of $115,829, raising its treasury to 632,457 BTC worth ~$70B.

articles.title: USDC ACTIVITY ON ETHEREUM INCREASES 300% SINCE JAN '24
articles.summary: USDC usage on Ethereum has hit all-time highs, with July transfer volume reaching $748.3B across 8.3M transactions.

articles.title: TETHER'S USDT HITS $1.24T IN JULY TRANSFERS, APTOS CLIMBS TO #3
articles.summary: USDT recorded $1.24T in onchain transfer volume in July, with Tron and Ethereum remaining the largest transport layers.
